trans-unit.source: An absolute URI is required.
trans-unit.target: An absolute URI is required.

trans-unit.source: The argument cannot be null or empty.
trans-unit.target: The argument cannot be null or empty.

trans-unit.source: author primary signature
trans-unit.target: author primary signature

trans-unit.note: 0 - Hash algorithm name 1 - certificate hash in given hash algorithm

trans-unit.source: SHA1 hash: {0}
trans-unit.target: SHA1 hash: {0}

trans-unit.source: Issued by: {0}
trans-unit.target: Issued by: {0}

trans-unit.source: Subject Name: {0}
trans-unit.target: Subject Name: {0}

trans-unit.source: Valid from: {0} to {1}
trans-unit.target: Valid from: {0} to {1}

trans-unit.source: The following certificates meet all given criteria:
trans-unit.target: The following certificates meet all given criteria:

trans-unit.source: A complete certificate chain could not be built for the signing certificate.
trans-unit.target: A complete certificate chain could not be built for the signing certificate.

trans-unit.source: Certificate chain validation failed.
trans-unit.target: Certificate chain validation failed.

trans-unit.source: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the default trust store selected by .NET for code signing.
trans-unit.target: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the default trust store selected by .NET for code signing.

trans-unit.source: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the default trust store selected by .NET for timestamping.
trans-unit.target: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the default trust store selected by .NET for timestamping.

trans-unit.source: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the fallback certificate bundle at '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the fallback certificate bundle at '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: X.509 certificate chain validation will not have any trusted roots. Chain building will fail with an untrusted status.
trans-unit.target: X.509 certificate chain validation will not have any trusted roots. Chain building will fail with an untrusted status.

trans-unit.source: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the system certificate bundle at '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: X.509 certificate chain validation will use the system certificate bundle at '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The commitment-type-indication attribute is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The commitment-type-indication attribute is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The commitment-type-indication attribute contains an invalid combination of values.
trans-unit.target: The commitment-type-indication attribute contains an invalid combination of values.

trans-unit.source: There are two certificates with conflicting allowUntrustedRoot attributes in the computed settings. The allowUntrustedRoot attribute is going to be set to false. Certificate: {0}-{1}
trans-unit.target: There are two certificates with conflicting allowUntrustedRoot attributes in the computed settings. The allowUntrustedRoot attribute is going to be set to false. Certificate: {0}-{1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - Hash algorithm 1 - Fingerprint 'allowUntrustedRoot' should not be localized

trans-unit.source: A list of trusted signers is required but none was found.
trans-unit.target: A list of trusted signers is required but none was found.

trans-unit.source: The package signature certificate fingerprint does not match any certificate fingerprint in the allow list.
trans-unit.target: The package signature certificate fingerprint does not match any certificate fingerprint in the allow list.

trans-unit.source: Cannot target author signatures that are countersignatures.
trans-unit.target: Cannot target author signatures that are countersignatures.

trans-unit.source: Byte signature not found in package archive: 0x{0}
trans-unit.target: Byte signature not found in package archive: 0x{0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the byte signature in hexadecimal

trans-unit.source: There are duplicate packages: {0}
trans-unit.target: There are duplicate packages: {0}

trans-unit.source: Invalid allowedVersions for package id '{0}': '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Invalid allowedVersions for package id '{0}': '{1}'

trans-unit.source: Certificate chain validation failed for an unspecified reason.
trans-unit.target: Certificate chain validation failed for an unspecified reason.

trans-unit.source: Invalid minClientVersion: '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Invalid minClientVersion: '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Invalid package archive.
trans-unit.target: Invalid package archive.

trans-unit.source: Invalid package version for package id '{0}': '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Invalid package version for package id '{0}': '{1}'

trans-unit.source: Invalid package version for a dependency with id '{0}' in package '{1}': '{2}'
trans-unit.target: Invalid package version for a dependency with id '{0}' in package '{1}': '{2}'
trans-unit.note: {0} is the dependency's package id. {1} is the package's identity. {2} is the dependency's version range.

trans-unit.source: Manifest file not found at '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Manifest file not found at '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Multiple timestamps are not accepted.
trans-unit.target: Multiple timestamps are not accepted.

trans-unit.source: The signature should be timestamped to enable long-term signature validity after the certificate has expired.
trans-unit.target: The signature should be timestamped to enable long-term signature validity after the certificate has expired.

trans-unit.source: Null or empty package id
trans-unit.target: Null or empty package id

trans-unit.source: The package is not signed.
trans-unit.target: The package is not signed.

trans-unit.source: The package signature is invalid or cannot be verified on this platform.
trans-unit.target: The package signature is invalid or cannot be verified on this platform.

trans-unit.source: An unexpected error occurred while checking package entries.
trans-unit.target: An unexpected error occurred while checking package entries.

trans-unit.source: Unable to delete temporary file '{0}'. Error: '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Unable to delete temporary file '{0}'. Error: '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The package '{0}' contains an entry '{1}' which is unsafe for extraction.
trans-unit.target: The package '{0}' contains an entry '{1}' which is unsafe for extraction.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package identity. {1} is the package entry

trans-unit.source: Signed Zip64 packages are not supported.
trans-unit.target: Signed Zip64 packages are not supported.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported targetFramework value '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Unsupported targetFramework value '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Error parsing nupkg metadata file {0} : {1}
trans-unit.target: Error parsing nupkg metadata file {0} : {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - nupkg metadata file path 1 - error message

trans-unit.source: The package is missing the required nuspec file.
trans-unit.target: The package is missing the required nuspec file.
trans-unit.note: package folder path will be appended to this message, if exists

trans-unit.source: signatureValidationMode is set to require, so packages are allowed only if signed by trusted signers; however, no trusted signers were specified.
trans-unit.target: signatureValidationMode is set to require, so packages are allowed only if signed by trusted signers; however, no trusted signers were specified.

trans-unit.source: This package is signed but not by a trusted signer.
trans-unit.target: This package is signed but not by a trusted signer.

trans-unit.source: This package was not repository signed with a certificate listed by this repository.
trans-unit.target: This package was not repository signed with a certificate listed by this repository.

trans-unit.source: This repository indicated that all its packages are repository signed; however, it listed no signing certificates.
trans-unit.target: This repository indicated that all its packages are repository signed; however, it listed no signing certificates.

trans-unit.source: The package signature file does not contain exactly one primary signature.
trans-unit.target: The package signature file does not contain exactly one primary signature.

trans-unit.source: The package signature contains multiple repository countersignatures.
trans-unit.target: The package signature contains multiple repository countersignatures.

trans-unit.source: This repository indicated that all its packages are repository signed; however, this package is unsigned.
trans-unit.target: This repository indicated that all its packages are repository signed; however, this package is unsigned.

trans-unit.source: A repository primary signature must not have a repository countersignature.
trans-unit.target: A repository primary signature must not have a repository countersignature.

trans-unit.source: signatureValidationMode is set to require, so packages are allowed only if signed by trusted signers; however, this package is unsigned.
trans-unit.target: signatureValidationMode is set to require, so packages are allowed only if signed by trusted signers; however, this package is unsigned.

trans-unit.source: Exactly one {0} attribute is required.
trans-unit.target: Exactly one {0} attribute is required.

trans-unit.source: The {0} attribute must have exactly one attribute value.
trans-unit.target: The {0} attribute must have exactly one attribute value.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0} {1}' from source '{2}': {3}
trans-unit.target: Package '{0} {1}' from source '{2}': {3}
trans-unit.note: 0 - package ID 1 - package versions 2 - package source url 3 - Log Message

trans-unit.source: Fail to load packages.config as XML file. Please check it.
trans-unit.target: Fail to load packages.config as XML file. Please check it.

trans-unit.source: Failed to write packages.config as XML file '{0}'. Error: '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Failed to write packages.config as XML file '{0}'. Error: '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Failed to update file time for {0}: {1}
trans-unit.target: Failed to update file time for {0}: {1}

trans-unit.source: Unable to find fallback package folder '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Unable to find fallback package folder '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: HTTP or HTTPS is required.
trans-unit.target: HTTP or HTTPS is required.

trans-unit.source: The argument is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The argument is invalid.

trans-unit.source: Invalid combination of arguments {0} and {1}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid combination of arguments {0} and {1}.

trans-unit.source: The ASN.1 data is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The ASN.1 data is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The version string '{0}' is not supported by this toolset. The highest supported version is '{1}'. Either use a lower version or upgrade your toolset.
trans-unit.target: The version string '{0}' is not supported by this toolset. The highest supported version is '{1}'. Either use a lower version or upgrade your toolset.

trans-unit.source: {0} This validation error occurred in a '{1}' element.
trans-unit.target: {0} This validation error occurred in a '{1}' element.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the validation error message. {1} is the local name of the XML element that causes the validation error.

trans-unit.source: The nuspec contains an invalid entry '{0}' in package '{1}' .
trans-unit.target: The nuspec contains an invalid entry '{0}' in package '{1}' .

trans-unit.source: The framework in the folder name of '{0}' in package '{1}' could not be parsed.
trans-unit.target: The framework in the folder name of '{0}' in package '{1}' could not be parsed.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the invalid path. {1} is the package ID and version.

trans-unit.source: The file is not a valid nupkg. File path: {0}
trans-unit.target: The file is not a valid nupkg. File path: {0}

trans-unit.source: The package contains an invalid package signature file.
trans-unit.target: The package contains an invalid package signature file.

trans-unit.source: The package signature file entry is invalid. {0}
trans-unit.target: The package signature file entry is invalid. {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} - error message suffix containing the reason for failure.

trans-unit.source: The central directory header field '{0}' has an invalid value ({1}).
trans-unit.target: The central directory header field '{0}' has an invalid value ({1}).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the name of field with the invalid value {1} is the field value

trans-unit.source: The local file header field '{0}' has an invalid value ({1}).
trans-unit.target: The local file header field '{0}' has an invalid value ({1}).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the name of field with the invalid value {1} is the field value

trans-unit.source: Nuspec file contains a package type with an invalid package version '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Nuspec file contains a package type with an invalid package version '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The primary signature is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The primary signature is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The repository countersignature is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The repository countersignature is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The package signature content is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The package signature content is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp signature is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp signature is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The URL value is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The URL value is invalid.

trans-unit.source: Invalid X.509 store purpose.
trans-unit.target: Invalid X.509 store purpose.

trans-unit.source: Installed {0} {1} from {2} to {3} with content hash {4}.
trans-unit.target: Installed {0} {1} from {2} to {3} with content hash {4}.
trans-unit.note: 0 - package id 1 - package version 2 - package source 3 - package installed path 4 - hex byte string, representing content hash

trans-unit.target: Path: {0}

trans-unit.source: MinClientVersion already exists in packages.config
trans-unit.target: MinClientVersion already exists in packages.config

trans-unit.target: Nuspec file does not contain the '{0}' node.

trans-unit.source: Nuspec file contains a package type that is missing the name attribute.
trans-unit.target: Nuspec file contains a package type that is missing the name attribute.

trans-unit.target: Some dependency group TFMs are missing a platform version: {0}

trans-unit.source: Some reference assembly group TFMs are missing a platform version: {0}

trans-unit.note: 0 - comma-separated list of files with bad TFMs

trans-unit.note: 0 - comma-separated list of reference group TFMs

trans-unit.source: Multiple {0} attributes are not allowed.
trans-unit.target: Multiple {0} attributes are not allowed.

trans-unit.source: Package contains multiple nuspec files.
trans-unit.target: Package contains multiple nuspec files.

trans-unit.source: The package contains multiple package signature files.
trans-unit.target: The package contains multiple package signature files.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' must contain an absolute path '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' must contain an absolute path '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The package does not contain a valid package signature file.
trans-unit.target: The package does not contain a valid package signature file.

trans-unit.source: Verification settings require a repository countersignature, but the package does not have a repository countersignature.
trans-unit.target: Verification settings require a repository countersignature, but the package does not have a repository countersignature.

trans-unit.source: The identifier '{0}' is deprecated.
trans-unit.target: The identifier '{0}' is deprecated.

trans-unit.source: The identifier '{0}' is a license. It cannot be used as an exception.
trans-unit.target: The identifier '{0}' is a license. It cannot be used as an exception.

trans-unit.source: The 'UNLICENSED' license identifier cannot be combined with the '+' operator.
trans-unit.target: The 'UNLICENSED' license identifier cannot be combined with the '+' operator.

trans-unit.source: The license expression '{0}' contains invalid characters.
trans-unit.target: The license expression '{0}' contains invalid characters.

trans-unit.source: The identifier '{0}' is not a standard exception.
trans-unit.target: The identifier '{0}' is not a standard exception.

trans-unit.source: The license expression is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The license expression is invalid.

trans-unit.source: Invalid element '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid element '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The identifier '{0}' is an exception. It cannot be used as a license.
trans-unit.target: The identifier '{0}' is an exception. It cannot be used as a license.

trans-unit.source: The license identifier '{0}' contains invalid characters.
trans-unit.target: The license identifier '{0}' contains invalid characters.

trans-unit.source: Mismatched parentheses in the expression.
trans-unit.target: Mismatched parentheses in the expression.

trans-unit.source: The license identifier(s) '{0}' is(are) not recognized by the current toolset.
trans-unit.target: The license identifier(s) '{0}' is(are) not recognized by the current toolset.

trans-unit.source: Unexpected license identifier '{0}'. The identifier is not allowed in this context.
trans-unit.target: Unexpected license identifier '{0}'. The identifier is not allowed in this context.

trans-unit.source: The owner has marked this package as 'UNLICENSED'. This means that there is no license that allows this package to be used outside of the copyright owner.
trans-unit.target: The owner has marked this package as 'UNLICENSED'. This means that there is no license that allows this package to be used outside of the copyright owner.

trans-unit.source: The license version string '{0}' is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The license version string '{0}' is invalid.

trans-unit.source: Unrecognized license type '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Unrecognized license type '{0}'

trans-unit.source: The license element value is empty. This is likely due to an authoring error.
trans-unit.target: The license element value is empty. This is likely due to an authoring error.

trans-unit.source: The license version string '{0}' is higher than the one supported by this toolset '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: The license version string '{0}' is higher than the one supported by this toolset '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The element 'license' cannot be empty.
trans-unit.target: The element 'license' cannot be empty.

trans-unit.source: Owners: {0}
trans-unit.target: Owners: {0}

trans-unit.source: The nuget-package-owners attribute is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The nuget-package-owners attribute is invalid.

trans-unit.target: Service index: {0}

trans-unit.target: Package entry already exists in packages.config. Id: {0}

trans-unit.target: Package entry does not exists in packages.config. Id: {0}, Version: {1}

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' package requires NuGet client version '{1}' or above, but the current NuGet version is '{2}'. To upgrade NuGet, please go to https://docs.nuget.org/consume/installing-nuget

trans-unit.target: PackageSignatureVerificationLog: PackageIdentity: {0} Source: {1} PackageSignatureValidity: {2}

trans-unit.target: Package stream should be seekable

trans-unit.target: Packages node does not exists in packages.config at {0}.

trans-unit.target: primary signature

trans-unit.target: The primary signature does not have a timestamp.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' cannot be null.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' cannot be null.

trans-unit.source: Arguments {0} and {1} were out of bounds for the array.
trans-unit.target: Arguments {0} and {1} were out of bounds for the array.

trans-unit.target: repository countersignature

trans-unit.target: The repository countersignature does not have a timestamp.

trans-unit.target: The timestamp certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp's generalized time is outside the timestamping certificate's validity period.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp's generalized time is outside the timestamping certificate's validity period.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp integrity check failed.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp integrity check failed.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp does not have a signing certificate.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp does not have a signing certificate.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp signing certificate is not yet valid.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp signing certificate is not yet valid.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp signature validation failed.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp signature validation failed.

trans-unit.source: The following certificate cannot be used for package signing as the private key provider is unsupported:
trans-unit.target: The following certificate cannot be used for package signing as the private key provider is unsupported:

trans-unit.source: Package signature contains an invalid attribute: {0}
trans-unit.target: Package signature contains an invalid attribute: {0}

trans-unit.source: Signature hash OID found: {0}
trans-unit.target: Signature hash OID found: {0}

trans-unit.source: The package hash uses an unsupported hash algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The package hash uses an unsupported hash algorithm.

trans-unit.source: signature
trans-unit.target: signature

trans-unit.source: Signature Hash Algorithm: {0}
trans-unit.target: Signature Hash Algorithm: {0}

trans-unit.source: The package integrity check failed. The package has changed since it was signed. Try clearing the local http-cache and run nuget operation again.
trans-unit.target: The package integrity check failed. The package has changed since it was signed. Try clearing the local http-cache and run nuget operation again.

trans-unit.source: Signature type: {0}
trans-unit.target: Signature type: {0}

trans-unit.source: The package already contains a signature. Please remove the existing signature before adding a new signature.
trans-unit.target: The package already contains a signature. Please remove the existing signature before adding a new signature.

trans-unit.source: Package stream read position cannot be longer than the length of the stream.
trans-unit.target: Package stream read position cannot be longer than the length of the stream.

trans-unit.source: Package stream read position cannot be before the current position in the stream.
trans-unit.target: Package stream read position cannot be before the current position in the stream.

trans-unit.source: The package is not signed. Unable to remove signature from an unsigned package.
trans-unit.target: The package is not signed. Unable to remove signature from an unsigned package.

trans-unit.source: The package is not signed. Unable to verify signature from an unsigned package.
trans-unit.target: The package is not signed. Unable to verify signature from an unsigned package.

trans-unit.source: The package already contains a repository countersignature. Please remove the existing signature before adding a new repository countersignature.
trans-unit.target: The package already contains a repository countersignature. Please remove the existing signature before adding a new repository countersignature.

trans-unit.source: The package was not opened correctly to perform signature operations. Please use a Stream-based constructor to have access to signature attributes of the package.
trans-unit.target: The package was not opened correctly to perform signature operations. Please use a Stream-based constructor to have access to signature attributes of the package.

trans-unit.source: {0} and {1} should be different. Package signing cannot be done in place.
trans-unit.target: {0} and {1} should be different. Package signing cannot be done in place.
trans-unit.note: 0 - PackageFilePath parameter name 1 - OutputFilePath parameter name

trans-unit.source: The signing-certificate attribute is not allowed.
trans-unit.target: The signing-certificate attribute is not allowed.

trans-unit.source: A certificate referenced by the signing-certificate attribute could not be found.
trans-unit.target: A certificate referenced by the signing-certificate attribute could not be found.

trans-unit.source: The signing-certificate attribute is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The signing-certificate attribute is invalid.

trans-unit.source: Either the signing-certificate or signing-certificate-v2 attribute must be present.
trans-unit.target: Either the signing-certificate or signing-certificate-v2 attribute must be present.

trans-unit.source: A certificate referenced by the signing-certificate-v2 attribute could not be found.
trans-unit.target: A certificate referenced by the signing-certificate-v2 attribute could not be found.

trans-unit.source: The signing-certificate-v2 attribute is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The signing-certificate-v2 attribute is invalid.

trans-unit.source: The signing-certificate-v2 attribute uses an unsupported hash algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The signing-certificate-v2 attribute uses an unsupported hash algorithm.

trans-unit.source: The signing certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.
trans-unit.target: The signing certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.

trans-unit.source: The lifetime signing EKU in the signing certificate is not supported.
trans-unit.target: The lifetime signing EKU in the signing certificate is not supported.

trans-unit.source: The signing certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The signing certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm.

trans-unit.source: The signing certificate is not yet valid.
trans-unit.target: The signing certificate is not yet valid.

trans-unit.source: The package cannot be signed as it would require the Zip64 format.
trans-unit.target: The package cannot be signed as it would require the Zip64 format.

trans-unit.source: The stream must be readable.
trans-unit.target: The stream must be readable.

trans-unit.source: The stream must be seekable.
trans-unit.target: The stream must be seekable.

trans-unit.source: String argument '{0}' cannot be null or empty
trans-unit.target: String argument '{0}' cannot be null or empty

trans-unit.source: The timestamp certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm ({0}). The following algorithms are supported: {1}.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm ({0}). The following algorithms are supported: {1}.
trans-unit.note: 0 - certificate signature algorithm name/oid 1 - supported signature algorithm names

trans-unit.source: The timestamper URL '{0}' has an invalid URI scheme. The supported schemes are '{1}' and '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: The timestamper URL '{0}' has an invalid URI scheme. The supported schemes are '{1}' and '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: 0 - url value 1 - Uri.Http scheme 2 - Uri.Https scheme

trans-unit.source: The timestamp response is invalid. Nonces did not match.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp response is invalid. Nonces did not match.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp service responded with HTTP status code '{0}' ('{1}').
trans-unit.target: The timestamp service responded with HTTP status code '{0}' ('{1}').
trans-unit.note: {0} is the httpResponse.StatusCode, {1} is the httpResponse.ReasonPhrase.

trans-unit.source: The timestamp signature has an unsupported digest algorithm ({0}). The following algorithms are supported: {1}.
trans-unit.target: The timestamp signature has an unsupported digest algorithm ({0}). The following algorithms are supported: {1}.
trans-unit.note: 0 - signature algorithm name/oid 1 - supported signature algorithm names

trans-unit.source: Timestamp: {0}
trans-unit.target: Timestamp: {0}

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while updating packages.config. The file was closed before the entry could be added.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while updating packages.config. The file was closed before the entry could be added.

trans-unit.source: Unable to parse the current NuGet client version.
trans-unit.target: Unable to parse the current NuGet client version.

trans-unit.source: Package hash information could not be read from the package signature.
trans-unit.target: Package hash information could not be read from the package signature.

trans-unit.source: An unexpected error occurred while verifying a package signature.
trans-unit.target: An unexpected error occurred while verifying a package signature.

trans-unit.source: The enum value '{0}' is unrecognized.
trans-unit.target: The enum value '{0}' is unrecognized.

trans-unit.source: The primary signature and repository countersignature are unrelated.
trans-unit.target: The primary signature and repository countersignature are unrelated.

trans-unit.source: The ASN.1 data is unsupported.
trans-unit.target: The ASN.1 data is unsupported.

trans-unit.source: The package signature format version is not supported. Updating your client may solve this problem.
trans-unit.target: The package signature format version is not supported. Updating your client may solve this problem.

trans-unit.note: 0 is a file path, 1 is a certificate subject, 2 is a certificate fingerprint, and 3 is a PEM-encoded certificate.
0 is a certificate subject, 1 is a certificate fingerprint, and 2 is a PEM-encoded certificate.

trans-unit.source: Verifying the {0} with certificate: {1}
trans-unit.target: Verifying the {0} with certificate: {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - Signature friendly 1 - X509Certificate2 details in the following format - Subject Name: SHA1 hash: Issued by: Valid from:

trans-unit.source: Verifying {0}'s timestamp with timestamping service certificate: {1}
trans-unit.target: Verifying {0}'s timestamp with timestamping service certificate: {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - signature friendly name 1 - X509Certificate2 details in the following format - Subject Name: SHA1 hash: Issued by: Valid from:

trans-unit.source: The revocation function was unable to check revocation because the certificate is not available in the cached certificate revocation list and NUGET_CERT_REVOCATION_MODE environment variable has been set to offline. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/certificateRevocationMode.
trans-unit.target: The revocation function was unable to check revocation because the certificate is not available in the cached certificate revocation list and NUGET_CERT_REVOCATION_MODE environment variable has been set to offline. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/certificateRevocationMode.

trans-unit.source: The revocation function was unable to check revocation because the revocation server could not be reached. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/certificateRevocationMode.
trans-unit.target: The revocation function was unable to check revocation because the revocation server could not be reached. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/certificateRevocationMode.

trans-unit.source: The {0} found a chain building issue: {1}
trans-unit.target: The {0} found a chain building issue: {1}

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s signing certificate is not trusted by the trust provider.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s signing certificate is not trusted by the trust provider.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.

trans-unit.source: The lifetime signing EKU in the {0}'s certificate is not supported.
trans-unit.target: The lifetime signing EKU in the {0}'s certificate is not supported.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s certificate is not yet valid.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s certificate is not yet valid.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s certificate chain validation failed with error(s): {1}
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s certificate chain validation failed with error(s): {1}

trans-unit.source: The {0} validity period has expired.
trans-unit.target: The {0} validity period has expired.

trans-unit.source: The {0} validation failed.
trans-unit.target: The {0} validation failed.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp certificate does not meet a minimum public key length requirement.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp's generalized time is outside the timestamping certificate's validity period.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp's generalized time is outside the timestamping certificate's validity period.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp integrity check failed.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp integrity check failed.

trans-unit.source: The {0} contains an invalid timestamp.
trans-unit.target: The {0} contains an invalid timestamp.

trans-unit.source: The {0} timestamp's message imprint uses an unsupported hash algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The {0} timestamp's message imprint uses an unsupported hash algorithm.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp does not have a signing certificate.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp does not have a signing certificate.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp signing certificate is not yet valid.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp signing certificate is not yet valid.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp signature has an unsupported digest algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp signature has an unsupported digest algorithm.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp signature validation failed.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp signature validation failed.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp certificate has an unsupported signature algorithm.

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamp found a chain building issue: {1}
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamp found a chain building issue: {1}

trans-unit.source: The {0}'s timestamping certificate is not trusted by the trust provider.
trans-unit.target: The {0}'s timestamping certificate is not trusted by the trust provider.

trans-unit.source: The {0} does not have a signing certificate.
trans-unit.target: The {0} does not have a signing certificate.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' changed from '{1}' to '{2}'
trans-unit.target: '{0}' changed from '{1}' to '{2}'
trans-unit.note: 0 - File name 1 - Original last write timestamp 2 - Updated last write timestamp

trans-unit.source: The zip format supports a limited date range. The following files are outside the supported range:
trans-unit.target: The zip format supports a limited date range. The following files are outside the supported range:
